entries.note: Opens the New Republic era in the chaotic weeks after the Battle of Endor.
A Rebel-and-Imperial love story spanning the Galactic Civil War into the New Republic.
Han and Chewie on a job between A New Hope and Empire.
A young-Luke adventure framed by a First Order-era narrator.
Leia on a decoy mission late in the Galactic Civil War.
Shara Bey and Kes Dameron, Poe's parents, in the weeks after Endor.
Bounty hunter Bazine Netal, later seen among the patrons of Maz Kanata.
Short stories built around the new creatures of The Force Awakens.
Rey, Finn, and Poe's lives just before the film opens.
Poe and Black Squadron hunt Lor San Tekka in the lead-up to the film.
Leia and the fracturing New Republic Senate, roughly six years before the film.
Middle volume of the Aftermath trilogy.
The trilogy's finale and the Battle of Jakku.

summary: The publishing program Lucasfilm ran in 2015-2017 to bridge Return of the Jedi and the sequel trilogy. Novels, comics, and short fiction, in release order.
title: Journey to Star Wars: The Force Awakens
